reason_detail: To increase diversity under premature convergence, mutation probability was raised from 0.1 to 0.18 (within [0.03, 0.75] and step ≤ 0.08) to encourage exploration. Crossover probability was reduced from 0.9 to 0.82 (within [0.45, 0.98]) to balance exploitation. Parameters eta_c, eta_m, and local_search_prob remain null as their capabilities are unsupported. Repair probability stays at 1.0 to preserve feasibility.

To increase diversity, mutation probability was raised from 0.18 to 0.26 (within [0.03, 0.75] and step ≤0.08) to encourage exploration, while crossover probability was reduced from 0.82 to 0.74 (within [0.45, 0.98]) to limit excessive recombination that may reinforce clustering. Repair probability remains at 1.0 to preserve perfect feasibility. Parameters requiring unsupported capabilities (eta_c, eta_m, local_search_prob) remain null.

To address stagnation and zero crowding entropy, mutation probability is increased by 0.08 (within max_step) to enhance exploration, while crossover probability is symmetrically decreased to reduce selection pressure and promote diversity. Repair probability remains at 1.0 as feasibility is already perfect. Unsupported parameters (eta_c, eta_m, local_search_prob) remain null per capability constraints.
